summary: Test suite covers core retention policies (age, size, keep-latest) but has significant gaps. Critical flaw: GitHub Actions workflow testing is entirely missing—task explicitly requires 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT', yet this suite is only local bats tests. Test 5 (generate_summary) appears broken—function expects JSON argument but test passes a file path. Test 4 (dry-run) and 5 use loose regex assertions that don't validate exact output format. Edge case coverage weak: no boundary conditions, no malformed JSON, no negative argument values, no policy conflicts. Missing shellcheck/bash -n validation tests required by task. Would catch basic regressions but insufficient for production—fails to address explicit workflow requirement that dominates half the task specification.
